tests.description: The blue robot enters the floor switch, the linked center gate opens, and the robot never overlaps the broken-paving hazard.

conditions.description: The blue robot enters the gate switch.
The switch-linked center gate reaches the open state.
The blue robot never enters the broken-paving hazard.

tests.description: The agent must remain inside the playable environment.

conditions.description: Agent remains within the play bounds.

child_summary:
I’ll begin by observing the first-person view, then navigate to the floor switch while keeping clear of the warning-marked broken paving.
The hazard is now visible along the left side, with the low yellow switch at its near corner. I’m approaching that corner from the surrounding green floor so the warning-marked paving stays outside the path.
That attempt failed because the jump carried the character over the hazard boundary; the delayed landing triggered the forbidden zone. I’m resetting and using a ground-only approach from the switch’s green-floor side.
